steps.t: The note contains directions to a specific location. Asking the scouts around Annâk-khurfu about this bat may give you some much-needed context.
All of the scouts you talked to about the bat have mentioned Rékkur, a dwarf who may be interested in what you've found. He stands guard in front of A…
The note describes an overlook west of the path leading up to Zarkul-sulûn, a ruin west of Annâk-khurfu. Rékkur has suggested that you venture to that…
The note has brought you to the body of a dwarf scout near Zarkul-sulûn. You should search the body and the immediate area for clues to what has trans…
You have found a new note, as well as possible clues to this scout's death. Rékkur will want to hear about your discoveries back at Annâk-khurfu.
